batch_summary.note: Nov 2025: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S010 Sev-2 — 'You are delusional' global sanity attack. Arc ACTIVE (10 signals).

primary_flags.cross_rf: RF-04 (DARVO cluster B-029; ARC-RF04-001 signal; 'you haven't gone along' visit-refusal DARVO)
primary_flags.summary: Nov 2025: Melissa calls Eli delusional in the context of a Phase C visit-refusal dispute. ROW-14755: 'You are delusional' — direct global sanity attack: not a dispute about a specific fact but a wholesale challenge to Eli's capacity to accurately perceive reality. Evidence Level E per ADD-001: reality-questioning language (global 'you are delusional' without specific denied claim). Severity elevation to Sev-2: this is the 7th+ documented instance of Melissa attacking Eli's perception of reality (ADD-004 arc escalation: sustained across multiple distinct conflict periods from 2022 through 2025). 'Delusional' is the highest-severity reality-attacking word in the dataset — more clinical and extreme than 'lying' or 'gaslight.' Phase C context: the November 2025 period is the most legally consequential window in the dataset (police report filed Nov 22 2025, visit refusals sustained). ADD-003 compound: 'delusional' accusation occurs within DARVO cluster (RF-04 B-029 primary) → RF-09+RF-04 COMP-RF09-007.

arc_updates.event: S010 signal added; 'delusional' language marks escalation of sanity-attack severity in Phase C
